## Facet interface

Facet is a trait for filtering results. It uses [Filter](./x-types.filter.md) as filters.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface Facet extends NamedModel<FacetModelName>, Identifiable 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [NamedModel](./x-types.namedmodel.md)<!-- -->&lt;[FacetModelName](./x-types.facetmodelname.md)<!-- -->&gt;, [Identifiable](./x-types.identifiable.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [filters](./x-types.facet.filters.md) | [Filter](./x-types.filter.md)<!-- -->\[\] | Filters available for the facet. |
|  [label](./x-types.facet.label.md) | string | Label that represents the facet text. |
